sidebar.logoutModalDesc: Are you sure you want to sign out? You will need to log in again to access the dashboard.

auth.loginDesc: Enter your email and password to access your account
auth.registerDesc: Sign up to start managing your aquariums
auth.registerSuccessDesc: A verification link has been sent. Please check your inbox or spam folder to activate your account before signing in.
auth.unverifiedEmail: Your email is not verified. Please check your inbox.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your identity and account security information.
profile.generalInfoDesc: Update the full name displayed in the system.
profile.securityDesc: Change your password regularly to maintain security.

controlPanel.title: Super Admin Control Panel
controlPanel.subtitle: Mass script execution center for AquaExpert Database & Storage.
controlPanel.warningDesc: The processes below will execute mass operations directly to Supabase. Please ensure a stable internet connection. Backup only secures text metadata (JSON), not physical image files.
controlPanel.confirmFolder: Are you sure you want to create Plant storage folders in Supabase Storage?
controlPanel.confirmSync: Are you sure you want to resync image URLs to the Database?
controlPanel.confirmBackup: Backup all Database text to a JSON file in Supabase Storage? (This DOES NOT download physical images).
controlPanel.confirmRestore: WARNING! RESTORE will overwrite current data with the latest JSON backup file. Continue?
controlPanel.syncHint: *Use this ONLY if you have manually uploaded images directly to Supabase Storage. The system will auto-link them to the database.
controlPanel.disasterHint: ℹ️ Backup files (JSON) are automatically saved to Storage. The Restore feature will overwrite the current database with the latest backup file.

adminPanelPage.title: Super Admin Control Panel
adminPanelPage.subtitle: Command center for AquaExpert database, storage, and expert systems.
